workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/philosophy-of-software-design.md with frontmatter and 13 sections: Core Vocabulary, Symptoms of Complexity, Deep Modules, Information Hiding and Leakage, Different Layer Different Abstraction, Pull Complexity Downward, Define Errors Out of Existence, Design It Twice, Comments Describe What Code Cannot, Modify Existing Code Consistently, Strategic vs Tactical, Anti-Patterns, Boundaries with Existing Codebase, Quick Self-Review.
workLog.outcome: 14733 bytes single file. All key rules from issue spec present. Anti-Patterns section captures Shallow class, Conjoined methods, Pass-through method, Configuration soup, Comment as crutch, Premature abstraction. Boundaries section ties rule to ai-agents tool/skill interfaces, agent prompts, plugin seams, hooks, memory systems (Serena/Forgetful), session and orchestrator seams. Self-review checklist closes the rule.
